description: Ranked 2nd out of 3000 candidates in the entrance examination. Gained expertise in both qualitative and quantitative research methodologies. Served as a Teaching Assistant for Professor Shaho Sabar, developing a passion for statistical analysis and quantitative research.
achievements: Ranked 2nd out of 3000 candidates in entrance exam
Teaching Assistant for Professor Shaho Sabar
Thesis: 'Disability Representation in Japanese Anime: The Case Study of Watching Anime Influence on Iranian Audiences' Thinking of Disability'

description: Studied communications theories, statistics, and research methodologies for the digital era. Gained proficiency in R and RStudio and a foundational understanding of Python, applying these skills to conduct statistical analyses.
achievements: Proficiency in R, RStudio, and Python for statistical analysis
Coursework in communications theories, statistics, and research methods
